idea.title: Parry Knight
idea.hook: Read the monster's wind-up, tap the exact parry window, counter-kill, grab the loot — descend until the dungeon breaks you.
idea.prototype: Portrait one-thumb duel RPG: hero faces ONE monster per dungeon room; each attack telegraphs with a readable wind-up + a sweeping timing marker; TAP inside the green parry window = perfect parry + auto counter-hit, miss = take damage. Kills drop GEAR (weapon/shield/trinket, 4 rarity tiers common->legendary with real stats: counter dmg, parry-window width, max HP, lifesteal) -> equip-or-sell -> next room, deeper. Every 5th room is a multi-phase BOSS; ~every 6th is a SHOP. 8 enemy archetypes with distinct telegraphs (rat/skeleton/archer/mage/ogre/twin-blade/wraith/brute) + elite modifiers (armored/poison/enraged) from depth 12. Window shrinks + wind-ups speed up with depth. Depth = score; best depth persisted; run ends at hp<=0.
idea.why_novel: first loot-RPG in a 164-game portfolio; wraps the praised parry mechanic in the highest-retention-ceiling genre (role)
idea.non_timer_pressure: hero HP drained by failed parries
